selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 头发, 毛发, 些微
words.definition: n. a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss

words.translation: a. 金的, 含金的, 金色的, 贵重的, 繁盛的
words.definition: s. marked by peace and prosperity

words.translation: n. 熊；vt. 忍受, 支承, 产生, 怀有, 通过卖空使跌价
words.definition: n. massive plantigrade carnivorous or omnivorous mammals with long shaggy coats and strong claws

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: a. 很少的, 微小的
words.definition: s very small

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 祖母, 女祖先
words.definition: n the mother of your father or mother

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: n. 房间, 空位, 场所；vi. 住宿, 居住
words.definition: n. an area within a building enclosed by walls and floor and ceiling

words.translation: a. 宽的, 广阔的, 普遍的, 宽阔的, 广泛的, 一般的；adv. 广阔地, 遍及各处地, 广泛地
words.definition: a. having great (or a certain) extent from one side to the other

words.translation: adv. 以前
words.definition: s. gone by; or in the past

words.translation: pron. 每件事物, 所有事物
words.definition: n. Whatever pertains to the subject under consideration;

words.translation: n. 女孩, 少女, 女佣
words.definition: n. a young woman

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此
words.definition: s. mentally and emotionally stable

words.translation: n. 碗, 木球, 大酒杯；v. 滚木球, 快而稳地行驶
words.definition: n. a round vessel that is open at the top; used chiefly for holding food or liquids;

words.translation: n. 荒野, 荒地；a. 野性的, 野蛮的, 野生的, 失控的, 任性的, 杂乱的, 轻率的, 狂热的, 疯狂的
words.definition: n. a wild primitive state untouched by civilization

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: a. 快乐的, 幸福的, 愉快的, 恰当的
words.definition: a. enjoying or showing or marked by joy or pleasure

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: n. a city in southeastern France on the Mediterranean; the leading resort on the French Riviera

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: n. 茶, 茶叶
words.definition: n. a beverage made by steeping tea leaves in water

words.translation: n. 欢迎, 欢迎词；a. 受欢迎的, 可随意的, 可喜的
words.definition: n. the state of being welcome

words.translation: a. 能干的, 能够的
words.definition: a. (usually followed by `to') having the necessary means or skill or know-how or authority to do something

words.translation: n. 行动, 活动, 动作, 作用, 战斗, 行为, 诉讼；vt. 对...起诉
words.definition: n. something done (usually as opposed to something said)

words.translation: n. 答案, 回答, 回报, 答辩；vt. 回答, 反驳, 适应, 响应, 符合
words.definition: n. a statement (either spoken or written) that is made to reply to a question or request or criticism or accusation

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: a. 清楚的, 明确的, 澄清的；adv. 清晰地
words.definition: n. the state of being free of suspicion

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 一般, 将军, 大体；a. 全面的, 大体的, 总的, 一般的, 普遍的
words.definition: n. a general officer of the highest rank

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: n. 会, 集会；a. 适宜的, 合适的
words.definition: n. a meeting at which a number of athletic contests are held

words.translation: n. 片刻, 瞬间, 重要, 阶段, 力矩
words.definition: n. a particular point in time

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: a. 近的, 近亲的, 近似的；adv. 接近, 亲近
words.definition: a. not far distant in time or space or degree or circumstances

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: n. 价格, 代价, 价值；vt. 定...的价格
words.definition: n. the amount of money needed to purchase something

words.translation: v. 读, 阅读, 理解；a. 有学问的
words.definition: n. something that is read

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延
words.definition: n. a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

words.translation: a. 几个的, 一些的, 各自的；pron. 几个
words.definition: s. (used with count nouns) of an indefinite number more than 2 or 3 but not many

words.translation: n. 部分, 参与, 一份, 参股, 份额；vt. 均分, 分担, 分享, 分配, 共有
words.definition: n. assets belonging to or due to or contributed by an individual person or group

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑
words.definition: v. be seated

words.translation: n. 汤, 马力；vt. 加速, 增加马力
words.definition: n. liquid food especially of meat or fish or vegetable stock often containing pieces of solid food

words.translation: n. 站立, 站住, 停顿, 讲台, 看台, 立场, 法院证人席；vi. 站, 立, 坐落, 停滞, 位于, 坚持, 维持原状
words.definition: n. the position where a thing or person stands

words.translation: n. 停留, 逗留, 制止, 延缓, 停止, 支柱, 支撑物, 支索；vt. 制止, 延缓, 坚持, 支持, 支撑, 用支索固定
words.definition: n. continuing or remaining in a place or state

words.translation: a. 强壮的, 坚固的, 坚强的, 强烈的, 有力的, 优良的；adv. 强劲地, 有力地, 猛烈地
words.definition: a. having strength or power greater than average or expected

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: n. 等待, 等候；vt. 等候, 期待, 延缓, 伺候, 推迟
words.definition: n. the act of waiting (remaining inactive in one place while expecting something)

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 西方, 西部；a. 西方的, 向西的
words.definition: n. the countries of (originally) Europe and (now including) North America and South America

words.translation: n. 全部, 全体, 整体, 完全之体系；a. 所有的, 完整的, 完全的, 纯粹的
words.definition: n. all of something including all its component elements or parts

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
words.definition: n. any immature animal

words.translation: n. 森林, 林区；vt. 植树于
words.definition: n. the trees and other plants in a large densely wooded area

words.translation: a. 活的, 生动的, 精力充沛的, 实况转播的；vi. 活, 生存, 居住
words.definition: v. lead a certain kind of life; live in a certain style

words.translation: n. 午后, 下午
words.definition: n. the part of the day between noon and evening

words.translation: a. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地
words.definition: s. isolated from others

words.translation: n. 八月；a. 威严的, 令人敬畏的
words.definition: n. the month following July and preceding September

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: a. 干净的, 清白的, 简洁的；adv. 清洁地, 完全地
words.definition: v. make clean by removing dirt, filth, or unwanted substances from

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: n. 方向, 指导, 趋势
words.definition: n. a line leading to a place or point

words.translation: n. 边缘, 尖锐, 刀刃, 优势；vt. 使锐利, 挤进, 镶边
words.definition: n. the boundary of a surface

words.translation: n. 饲料, 一餐, 饲养；vt. 喂, 饲养, 放牧, 靠...为生
words.definition: n. food for domestic livestock

words.translation: n. 乐趣, 玩笑, 娱乐；vi. 开玩笑
words.definition: n. activities that are enjoyable or amusing

words.translation: n. 守卫者, 警戒, 护卫队, 防护装置；vt. 保卫, 看守, 当心
words.definition: n. a person who keeps watch over something or someone

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: n. 语言, 文字, 措辞
words.definition: n. a systematic means of communicating by the use of sounds or conventional symbols

words.translation: n. 记忆, 记忆力, 回忆, 纪念, 存储；n. 内存
words.definition: n. something that is remembered

words.translation: n. 次序, 规则, 命令；vi. 命令, 定货
words.definition: n. (often plural) a command given by a superior (e.g., a military or law enforcement officer) that must be obeyed

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: v. give pleasure to or be pleasing to

words.translation: n. 预备好的状态, 现款；a. 准备好的, 备用的, 可以使用的
words.definition: n. poised for action

words.translation: n. 休息, 睡眠, 安息, 稍息, 静止, 支架, 休息处, 其余者, 剩余部分；vi. 休息, 睡, 长眠, 安心, 静止, 停止, 安置, 依赖
words.definition: n. freedom from activity (work or strain or responsibility)

words.translation: n. 大小, 尺寸, 规模, 尺码, 能力, 浆料；vt. 上浆, 依大小排列
words.definition: n. the physical magnitude of something (how big it is)

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币
words.definition: a. yielding readily to pressure or weight

words.translation: n. 传播, 散布, 伸展；a. 双唇展开的, 伸展的
words.definition: n. process or result of distributing or extending over a wide expanse of space

words.translation: n. 夏季, 全盛时期；vi. 避暑, 过夏天
words.definition: n. the warmest season of the year; in the northern hemisphere it extends from the summer solstice to the autumnal equinox

words.translation: n. 桌子, 餐桌, 工作台, 铭文, 表格, 表, 高原, 平地层；vt. 搁置, 嵌合, 制表, 把...列入议事日程
words.definition: n. a set of data arranged in rows and columns

words.translation: n. 比率, 率, 速度, 价格, 费用, 等级；vt. 估价, 认为, 鉴定等级, 责骂
words.definition: n. a magnitude or frequency relative to a time unit

words.translation: n. 火, 炉火, 电炉, 火灾, 闪光体, 炮火, 热情；vt. 点燃, 烧制, 使发光, 激动, 放枪, 解雇
words.definition: n. the event of something burning (often destructive)

words.translation: a. 忧虑的, 发愁的, 渴望的
words.definition: s. eagerly desirous

words.translation: a. 高兴的, 快乐的
words.definition: s. greatly pleased

words.translation: n. 媒体, 方法, 媒介；a. 半生熟的, 中间的
words.definition: n. a means or instrumentality for storing or communicating information

words.translation: n. 秋天, 成熟期
words.definition: n the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: prep. 在旁边
words.definition: n. At the side of; on one side of.

words.translation: n. 乡下地方, 乡下居民
words.definition: n. rural regions

words.translation: a. 高兴的, 喜欢的, 情愿的
words.definition: a. showing or causing joy and pleasure; especially made happy

words.translation: n. 欢喜, 乐事, 高兴；vt. 使快乐, 令人高兴
words.definition: n. the emotion of great happiness

words.translation: n. 湖, 池, 色淀；v. (使)血球溶解
words.definition: n. a body of (usually fresh) water surrounded by land

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
words.definition: n. location near or direction toward the left side; i.e. the side to the north when a person or object faces east

words.translation: a. 孤单的, 孤寂的, 荒凉的
words.definition: s. marked by dejection from being alone

words.translation: a. 大声的, 不断的, 喧吵的；adv. 高声地, 大声地
words.definition: a. characterized by or producing sound of great volume or intensity

words.translation: n. 奶, 乳状物；vt. 挤乳, 榨取
words.definition: n. a white nutritious liquid secreted by mammals and used as food by human beings

words.translation: n. 思想, 愿望, 智力, 记忆, 心理, 情绪, 理智, 主意, 心意；vi. 介意, 注意, 留心
words.definition: n. that which is responsible for one's thoughts and feelings; the seat of the faculty of reason

words.translation: n. 充分, 很多, 丰富；a. 很多的, 足够的, 丰富的
words.definition: n. a full supply

words.translation: n. 日落, 同伙, 组合, 集合, 装置；vt. 放, 安置, 放置, 设定, 使凝结, 点燃, 确定, 点缀, 使就位, 树立, 分配, 调整
words.definition: n. a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used

words.translation: n. 扫除, 打扫, 肃清, 视野, 范围, 全胜；vt. 扫除, 掸去, 猛拉, 扫荡, 肃清, 冲走, 刮起, 环视, 掠过, 扫射
words.definition: n. a wide scope

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的
words.definition: n. English phonetician; one of the founders of modern phonetics (1845-1912)

words.translation: n. 文本, 正文, 课文, 主题, 圣经文句, 乐谱
words.definition: n. the words of something written

words.translation: n. 冬季, 萧条期, 衰退期；a. 冬天的
words.definition: n. the coldest season of the year; in the northern hemisphere it extends from the winter solstice to the vernal equinox

words.translation: n. 黄色；a. 黄色的
words.definition: n. yellow color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of sunflowers or ripe lemons

words.translation: a. 宽广的, 辽阔的, 广大的, 显著的；adv. 宽阔地
words.definition: n. slang term for a woman

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: n. 劈开, 裂片, 裂缝, 分裂, 派系, 派别, 柳条；a. 劈开的
words.definition: n. extending the legs at right angles to the trunk (one in front and the other in back)

words.translation: adv. 如此, 因此, 到如此程度
words.definition: r. in the way indicated; (`thusly' is a nonstandard variant)

words.translation: num. 十二, 十二个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of eleven and one

words.translation: n. 饼干
words.definition: n. small round bread leavened with baking-powder or soda

words.translation: a. 饥饿的, 荒年的, 渴望的, 不毛的
words.definition: a. feeling hunger; feeling a need or desire to eat food

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的
words.definition: n. a charge of ammunition for a single shot

words.translation: n. 太阳, 日, 日光, 阳光；vt. 晒
words.definition: n. the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system

words.translation: a. 光辉的, 灿烂的, 有才气的；[机] 亮的
words.definition: s. of surpassing excellence

words.translation: n. 破裂, 突发, 爆发；v. 爆裂, 突发, 充满
words.definition: n. a sudden flurry of activity (often for no obvious reason)

words.translation: n. 小屋, 茅舍
words.definition: n a small house with a single story
